    outputs:
      git_client: ${{ steps.scope.outputs.git_client }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4v7
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - uses: pnpm/action-setup@v4v6
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4v7
        with:
          node-version: 26-file: .node-version
          cache: pnpm
      - name: Verify configured Node.js
        run: test "v$(cat .node-version)" = "$(node --version)"
      - run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
      - id: scope
        name: Detect affected Git Client project
